subtasks.description: Engineer 'u_7732' attempts to deploy a hotfix to production environment 'prod-us-east-1' outside of the approved maintenance window (current time: 2:15 AM UTC Tuesday).

plan.cost_rationale: Simple task — Haiku classifier, small tier

output.reason: Deployment denied. User role 'engineer' satisfies POL-401 requirements for production access. However, deployment is outside approved maintenance window (current time: Tuesday 02:15 UTC; approved window: Saturday 10 PM – Sunday 6 AM UTC). POL-402 requires Change Advisory Board (CAB) approval for out-of-window production deployments, which has not been obtained.
